_comment: Author: RKOJ-ELENO :: 2026-05-24 — wake-on-demand bot dispatcher config (C.5)

sentinel._note: alarm bot — operator may poll periodically; longer TTL

librarian._note: RAG search — typically one-shot recall; shorter TTL

auditor._note: secret scan — fast bursts then idle

scribe._note: Haiku-backed; cheaper to cold-start than keep warm

custodian._note: HOT — always-on (in hot_bots above); TTL irrelevant

stealth-browser._note: browser cold-start is expensive (~5s Chrome launch); long TTL
